chunks.content: JWT tokens are required for all /api routes. ERR_AUTH_401 is thrown when the token is missing or expired. Use Authorization Bearer headers.
Conversation memories are stored in Postgres with pgvector. Pool size defaults are documented in deployment notes. session_uuid dd25259d is an example id.
FOLLOWS edge type encodes reading order only, not semantic similarity. Sequential chunk links must not be treated as RELATED_TO.

Document chunks are contextualized for embeddings via buildEmbedText as Title › Section › Body. vectorOverFetch and heuristicRerank improve precision. RETRIEVED_EVIDENCE_CONTRACT and EMPTY evidence marker reduce hallucination. Cite evidence ids in answers. minScoreKb 0.40 gates weak neighbors.
Token compaction behavior packs evidence under maxEvidenceChars. Limit chunks from same source document with maxChunksPerSource. ingest pipeline embedding batch size is 32.
Deployment steps after migration: apply schema v22/v23, reEmbedAll, then reprocess or reEmbedSource for KB PDFs. Phase order for retrieval implementation is documented in the plan.
Compare auth and storage sections: Auth covers JWT; Storage covers Postgres persistence for chat memory.
Today the weather is sunny with light winds. This chunk should never answer product questions.
